description_long: This is a black Ford-style pickup truck modified for police use, featuring bold white 'STATE POLICE' and 'STATE OF MISSOURI' lettering on both side doors. The vehicle has a robust front grille, side mirrors, and a set of five yellow emergency lights mounted on the roof above the windshield. The truck bed is covered, and the rear features standard taillights and a visible license plate. The windows are tinted, and the wheels are solid black with visible hubcaps. The overall build is sturdy, with metallic trim and a utilitarian design suitable for law enforcement duties.
description: A black Ford-style police pickup truck with white 'STATE POLICE' markings, yellow roof lights, and a covered truck bed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, headlights, side mirrors, and yellow roof-mounted emergency lights.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the large 'STATE POLICE STATE OF MISSOURI' text and both doors, as well as the covered truck bed.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the tailgate, taillights, covered bed, and a visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view with 'STATE POLICE STATE OF MISSOURI' text and the full length of the vehicle.
attribute_police_markings: Large white 'STATE POLICE' and 'STATE OF MISSOURI' text on both side doors in bold, block letters. No numbers, stripes, or checkers are visible.
attribute_emergency_lights: Five small yellow dome-shaped emergency lights mounted in a row on the roof above the windshield. No roof light bar or additional lights are visible.
attribute_license_plate: A license plate is visible on both the front and rear bumpers, featuring a white background with blue text. No special police markings or codes are discernible.
